advancement_condition: Must reach 100% in current phase before cross-department learning begins and next phase promotion is granted.

standalone_topics: Food Molding Techniques for Visual Appeal

current_focus_areas: Beginning independent study across all assigned knowledge domains: testing consistency (Syringe Flow, Spoon Tilt, Fork Drip), thickener types (Amylase-Resistant, Instant vs Cook, Starch-Based vs Gum-Based), compensatory strategies (Mendelsohn Maneuver, Effortful Swallow, Supraglottic Swallow, Head Rotation, Chin Tuck), swallow study types (FEES, MBSS), dysphagia screening tools (3-oz Challenge, Water Swallow Test, GUSS, EAT-10), complete IDDSI levels 0-7 with exact specifications, equipment and tools, thickening protocols, and 12 standalone clinical topics including IDDSI Framework, dysphagia assessment, moisture content management, aspiration risk management, and texture modification techniques. Building foundational expertise as Department Leader of the Texture & Dysphagia Science department.
